scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:unit: node src/commander.test.js && node src/security-builder.test.js && node src/lib/validation.test.js && node src/lib/semantic-checks.test.js && node src/lib/visual-narrator.test.js && node src/lib/process-visualizer.test.js && node src/plan-generator.test.js && node src/plan-generator.integration.test.js && node src/lib/plan-checker.test.js && node src/lib/plan-consistency.test.js && node src/lib/feature-fit-scorer.test.js && node src/lib/plan-diff.test.js && node src/plan-benchmark.test.js && node src/builders/page/page-builder-template.test.js && node src/builders/microflow/microflow-builder-template.test.js && node src/builders/microflow/lib/sequence-flow.test.js && node src/builders/workflow/workflow-builder-template.test.js
scripts.validate:plan: node -e "if(!process.env.npm_config_plan){console.error('Usage: npm run validate:plan --plan=<path-to-plan.json>');process.exit(1)}" && node src/commander.js "$npm_config_plan" --validate-only
scripts.run:plan: node -e "if(!process.env.npm_config_plan){console.error('Usage: npm run run:plan --plan=<path-to-plan.json>');process.exit(1)}" && node src/commander.js "$npm_config_plan"
scripts.check:plan: node -e "if(!process.env.npm_config_plan){console.error('Usage: npm run check:plan --plan=<path-to-plan.json> [--input-dir=<input-dir>]');process.exit(1)}" && node src/plan-checker.js --plan="$npm_config_plan" ${npm_config_input_dir:+--input-dir="$npm_config_input_dir"}
scripts.diff:plans: node -e "if((!process.env.npm_config_left||!process.env.npm_config_right)&&!process.env.npm_config_benchmark_dir){console.error('Usage: npm run diff:plans --left=<plan-a.json> --right=<plan-b.json> [--format=json|markdown] OR --benchmark-dir=<benchmark-run-dir>');process.exit(1)}" && node src/plan-diff.js ${npm_config_benchmark_dir:+--benchmark-dir="$npm_config_benchmark_dir"} ${npm_config_left:+--left="$npm_config_left"} ${npm_config_right:+--right="$npm_config_right"} ${npm_config_left_label:+--left-label="$npm_config_left_label"} ${npm_config_right_label:+--right-label="$npm_config_right_label"} ${npm_config_format:+--format="$npm_config_format"}
